entries.title: COMMENTARY ON THE PROVERBS OF SOLOMON, FRAGMENT 24:3-4 on proverbs 24:3
entries.excerpt: [Solomon] calls Christ wisdom, intelligence and reason. The house is [Christ's] church which he built and whose storerooms he filled with every kind of precious and splendid riches. The storerooms are the hearts of those who believe in Christ and live in imitation of him—those hearts, I mean, which abound in goodness in thoughts, words and deeds. For this reason, they are made worthy of eternal blessedness.
